app.name: WorldCupManager 2026
app.tagline: National team management and tournament simulation

auth.title: Enter the manager center
auth.subtitle: Open the API-connected tournament universe with demo accounts.
auth.name: Full name

dashboard.title: Manager dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Team morale, squad balance, fixtures and media pressure in one view.
dashboard.homeSummary: Today’s staff priorities: match plan, squad balance and public pressure.
dashboard.noPerformers: Performance data has not formed yet.
dashboard.simulationComplete: Next match simulated and dashboard refreshed.
dashboard.pressConferenceReady: Media pack is ready for the press conference.

teams.title: 48 teams, 12 groups
teams.subtitle: Start from the official 2026 group structure.

squad.title: Final 26-player squad
squad.subtitle: Minimum 23, maximum 26 players and at least 3 goalkeepers are required.
squad.noPlayers: No players found for this team.

errors.minPlayers: Final squad must have at least 23 players.
errors.maxPlayers: Final squad can have at most 26 players.
errors.minGoalkeepers: Final squad must include at least 3 goalkeepers.

warnings.lowDefenders: Your team does not have enough defenders.

tactics.title: Tactics center
tactics.subtitle: Manage formation, 11-player pitch layout and tactical sliders.
tactics.dropHint: Drag a player into a pitch slot
tactics.recommendedXiSubtitle: Automatic selection based on formation, position fit, form, fitness and national-team status.
tactics.recommendationError: Could not build a Recommended XI.
tactics.recommendationApplied: Recommended XI applied to the pitch.
tactics.noRecommendation: Press Recommended XI to generate a lineup.
tactics.noPlayers: No players are available for this team.
tactics.noBenchPlayers: All available players are currently assigned.
tactics.noLeftOutPlayers: No important players were left out.

leftOutReasons.minorInjury: Held back due to injury risk

tactics.notEnoughPlayers: At least 11 eligible players are required for a recommendation.

tournament.title: Tournament center
tournament.subtitle: Group tables, match center, leaders, injuries and news.
tournament.errorMessage: Could not load tournament center data.

match.title: Match center
match.reportSubtitle: Scoreline, performance data, key events and post-match reaction.
match.noRelatedNews: No generated news for this match yet.

summary.notPlayed: The match has not been played yet.
summary.noTurningPoint: No single turning point stood out.
summary.managerWin: The selected team delivered the result and eased pressure on the staff.
summary.managerDraw: The selected team avoided defeat, but the staff still has details to fix.
summary.managerLoss: The selected team faces stronger scrutiny after this result.

factors.drawControl: The game was balanced and neither side separated clearly.
factors.cleanSheet: Defensive control and the clean sheet shaped the result.
factors.chanceQuality: Chance quality and xG edge decided the match.
factors.shotAccuracy: Sharper shooting on target created the difference.
factors.efficiency: Finishing efficiency was the decisive edge.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.subtitle: Data verification, fixtures, teams, players and simulation commands.

knockout.title: Knockout bracket
knockout.subtitle: Top 2 teams and the best 8 third-placed teams advance to the Round of 32.

stats.title: Player statistics
stats.subtitle: Goals, assists, appearances, average rating, cards and goalkeeper clean sheets.

opponentAnalysis.title: Opponent analysis
opponentAnalysis.subtitle: Pre-match scouting for the selected team's next scheduled fixture.
opponentAnalysis.noUpcomingMatch: No scheduled match is available for analysis.

planReasons.targetBuildUp: Target weak buildup and force rushed clearances.
planReasons.manageEnergy: Keep pressure compact without exhausting the block.
planReasons.attackSpace: Use direct attacks into the space behind their back line.
planReasons.controlRhythm: Use midfield control to choose the game speed.
planReasons.protectDepth: Protect space behind the defense against their runners.
planReasons.compressSpace: Compress the pitch and keep the opponent away from rhythm.
planReasons.exploitTransitions: Break quickly when their attacking shape opens space.
planReasons.selectiveBreaks: Counter only when the first pass is clean.

pressConference.title: Press conference
pressConference.subtitle: Handle media questions before the selected team's next match.
pressConference.noUpcomingMatch: No scheduled match is available for a press conference.

questions.opponentThreat: {{opponent}} are rated as a {{threatLevel}} threat. How aggressive will your match plan be?
questions.groupSituation: Your group position is {{groupPosition}} with {{groupPoints}} points. Is this match already decisive?
questions.moraleCheck: Team morale is at {{morale}}. What message do you want the squad to hear before kickoff?
questions.recentForm: Your recent form reads {{formSequence}}. How much does that influence your selection?
questions.favoritePressure: {{team}} are expected to control this fixture against {{opponent}}. Do you accept favorite status?
questions.underdogPlan: {{opponent}} look stronger on paper. How do you convince the fans this match is winnable?

responses.confidentDefault: We trust our work and we are going for the win.
responses.balancedDefault: We respect the opponent, but our plan is clear.
responses.defensiveDefault: The first job is to stay compact and disciplined.
responses.confidentThreat: Big opponents create big opportunities. We will attack the game.
responses.balancedThreat: We need courage with control. The details will decide it.
responses.defensiveThreat: We must deny their strengths before thinking about anything else.
responses.confidentGroup: We want to take control of the group now.
responses.balancedGroup: The table matters, but we stay focused on the next action.
responses.defensiveGroup: A mature result is more important than a headline performance.
responses.confidentMorale: The players are ready to respond with personality.
responses.balancedMorale: The group is together and the staff will protect that balance.
responses.defensiveMorale: We will keep the noise outside and focus on structure.
responses.confidentForm: Good form gives us permission to be brave.
responses.balancedForm: Form helps, but each World Cup match starts from zero.
responses.defensiveForm: We cannot let recent results make us careless.
responses.confidentFavorite: We accept expectations and want to play like a leading team.
responses.balancedFavorite: Expectations do not win matches. Execution does.
responses.defensiveFavorite: Favorite tags are for the media; we need humility.
responses.confidentUnderdog: We are not here to admire anyone. We can hurt them.
responses.balancedUnderdog: Respect and belief can exist together.
responses.defensiveUnderdog: We need patience, discipline and the right moments.

reactions.confidentReaction: Media outlets frame the answer as bold and energizing.
reactions.balancedReaction: The room reads the answer as calm and professional.
reactions.defensiveReaction: Journalists call the tone cautious but organized.
reactions.confidentThreatReaction: The headline is clear: {{team}} will not sit back against {{opponent}}.
reactions.balancedThreatReaction: Analysts praise the controlled confidence before facing {{opponent}}.
reactions.defensiveThreatReaction: The media expect a compact plan built to slow {{opponent}} down.
reactions.confidentGroupReaction: Supporters like the ambition to seize the group initiative.
reactions.balancedGroupReaction: The press sees a measured answer to a tense group picture.
reactions.defensiveGroupReaction: Board voices appreciate the low-risk language around the group table.
reactions.confidentMoraleReaction: The squad receives a visible morale lift from the public backing.
reactions.balancedMoraleReaction: The answer steadies the room and reinforces togetherness.
reactions.defensiveMoraleReaction: The media pressure drops, though fans wanted a stronger statement.
reactions.confidentFormReaction: The press senses momentum and raises expectations.
reactions.balancedFormReaction: The answer keeps recent form in perspective.
reactions.defensiveFormReaction: The cautious tone lowers noise around selection pressure.
reactions.confidentFavoriteReaction: Accepting favorite status excites fans but increases scrutiny.
reactions.balancedFavoriteReaction: The answer keeps standards high without feeding the hype.
reactions.defensiveFavoriteReaction: The board likes the humility, but supporters hear caution.
reactions.confidentUnderdogReaction: The message creates a defiant pre-match mood.
reactions.balancedUnderdogReaction: The media call it respectful, realistic and quietly ambitious.
reactions.defensiveUnderdogReaction: The answer lowers pressure and signals a survival-first plan.

journey.title: Tournament journey
journey.subtitle: Track the selected team's World Cup path, manager grade and media reaction.
journey.noMatches: No tournament matches found for this team yet.
journey.noImportantMatch: No decisive match has formed yet.
journey.championBody: {{team}} completed the World Cup journey and lifted the trophy. The manager report marks this as a historic campaign.

expectations.winOrFinal: Win it or reach the final

eliminationReasons.groupElimination: The team finished the group stage in position {{position}} with {{points}} points and missed the qualifying cut.
eliminationReasons.knockoutElimination: The knockout defeat ended the run and shifted the review toward selection, risk control and match management.

reactions.championBoard: The board treats the campaign as a landmark achievement.
reactions.championFans: Supporters are celebrating a once-in-a-generation tournament.
reactions.eliminationConcern: The board wants a detailed review of the tournament exit.
reactions.eliminationFrustration: Supporters are frustrated by how the journey ended.
reactions.eliminationScrutiny: Media pressure turns sharply toward accountability.
reactions.boardExcellent: The board is highly satisfied with the manager's work.
reactions.fansInspired: Fans feel the team is playing above expectation.
reactions.mediaPraise: The media is framing the campaign positively.
reactions.fansCautious: Fans are encouraged but still cautious.
reactions.mediaBalanced: Media coverage is balanced and analytical.
reactions.boardUneasy: The board is uneasy and wants clearer progress.
reactions.mediaQuestions: The media is asking sharper tactical questions.
reactions.boardCritical: The board is openly concerned by the results.
